creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
So many reasons to love the newly opened public beach in Dubai:

📍 Dubai Islands Beach in Deira, near Centara Mirage Resort

✔️Free entry
✔️Free use of sun loungers
✔️Beautiful pavement 
✔️ Showers and changing rooms
✔️ Ice cream and beverage stalls 
✔️ Pet-friendly
✔️ Gorgeous sunset view

⚠️ There are no food stalls at the moment, so pack some light bites from home.

Tag your beach buddies!
